title: 'I am available,' investment banker Matthieu Pigasse tells the left ahead of 2027 election
subhead: The businessman, who always dreamed of a political future, held several meetings with Socialist, Green and Communist leaders, aiming to unite them all while never publicly criticizing radical leftist candidate Jean-Luc Mélenchon.

title: 2026 World Cup poses massive security challenge for US law enforcement
EU targets 'technological sovereignty' with push for homegrown tech and distance with US and Asia
US says thwarts Iranian missile and drone attacks after strikes on target in Strait of Hormuz
subhead: The US military said it had intercepted a wave of Iranian missile and drone attacks across the Gulf and carried out self-defense strikes on Iran's Qeshm Island. Tehran says it has successfully hit American military bases in the region.

title: Turkey is a quiet but strategic presence in Mali
subhead: Over the past decade, trade between Ankara and Bamako has more than tripled, and arms and ammunition have become Turkey's leading exports to Mali since 2024.

title: Les Nuits de Fourvière in Lyon unveils a vibrant program to celebrate the festival's 80th anniversary
subhead: Through July 25, the festival is presenting 60 open-air shows, concerts, performances and masked balls, including 'To See the Stars Again' by the Australian contemporary circus troupe Circa.

title: 'It's the Palme d'Or of French hospitality': The government unveils its updated list of the 33 most luxurious hotels in France
subhead: The new round of the government's 'Palaces de France' label was revealed on June 2, with six new additions and four removals. The initiative aims to showcase this flagship sector of French expertise, even though the owners of these establishments are rarely French.

Putin faces a series of setbacks, fueling discontent in Russia and raising doubts about his strategy
subhead: While the Russian president claims that victory in Ukraine is within reach, Kyiv is stepping up drone strikes deep inside Russian territory. These military setbacks compound the country's mounting economic difficulties.

title: The Bolloré protégée spreading Russian propaganda in France
subhead: Xenia Fedorova, the former director of the now-banned Russian channel RT France, has free rein to advance the Kremlin's version of events without contradiction across the media empire of far-right billionaire Vincent Bolloré.

title: Elon Musk, SpaceX and the illusion of wealth
subhead: The upcoming stock market listing of SpaceX values the company, of which the billionaire owns less than 50%, at nearly $2 trillion. This figure relies on the success of projects that are unrealistic within any reasonable financial timeframe, such as establishing a colony on Mars or building data centers in space.
